S.FORM: James Adomian kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 1, James Adomian, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *ames~ɕ a*omian kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *ames~ɕ a*omian, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: *ames~ɕ a*omian kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *ames~ɕ a*omian, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
